SELECT toInt256OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values WHERE value != 'abc';
SELECT value, toInt256OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values WHERE toInt256OrNull(value) IS NULL;
SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE toInt256OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY toInt256OrNull(value);
SELECT (SELECT toInt256OrNull(value) FROM test_values ORDER BY value LIMIT 1) AS min_value, (SELECT toInt256OrNull(value) FROM test_values ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 1) AS max_value;
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT toInt256OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_count FROM t2 WHERE converted_value IS NULL;
SELECT CASE WHEN toInt256OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS validity FROM test_values;
